title: Weather Forecast: Cooler, Drier Conditions Expected
summary: Cooler and drier weather is expected tonight and into Sunday, with scattered storms on Monday. A mild first week of summer is anticipated.
charlotte_impact: Provides a short-term weather outlook for residents planning weekend activities and preparing for the upcoming week.

title: Union County Businesses, Events Impacted by Severe Flooding
summary: Widespread flooding in Union County has led to stranded cars and restaurant closures, impacting local businesses and forcing the cancellation of soccer matches.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the disruptive impact of severe weather on local businesses and community events in Union County.

title: Fan Remembers Chance Meeting with NASCAR Legend Kyle Busch
summary: Pamela Hauck reflects on her unexpected final meeting with NASCAR legend Kyle Busch, sharing her memories of the encounter.
charlotte_impact: Offers a personal perspective on the impact of a well-known figure's passing on their fans and community.

title: Wrongful Death Lawsuit Filed in Fatal Plane Crash
summary: Greg Biffle's ex-wife, Nicole Biffle, files a wrongful death lawsuit alleging negligence in the plane crash at Statesville Regional Airport that killed 7 people.
charlotte_impact: Addresses legal implications and accountability following a tragic aviation accident, raising questions about safety standards.

title: Technical Issues Disrupt End-of-Year Testing in Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools
summary: CMS addresses families as technical issues disrupt end-of-year testing, raising concerns among parents about increased student stress and anxiety.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the challenges of technology integration in education and the impact on student well-being during high-stakes assessments.

title: Shelby Officer Fired; NC SBI to Investigate Use of Force
summary: A Shelby police officer has been fired, and the NC SBI will investigate a use-of-force incident. Local authorities requested the agency's assistance.
charlotte_impact: Indicates a serious incident involving law enforcement and the importance of independent oversight in use-of-force cases.

title: Couple Wins $1.6M Judgment Against Builder Over Construction Issues
summary: A Denver couple won a $1.6 million judgment against Nest Homes, alleging breach of contract and fraudulent misrepresentation related to flooding and delays.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the potential financial and legal consequences of poor construction practices and the importance of consumer protection.

title: Shelby Officer Suspended for Punching Woman During Arrest
summary: A Shelby police officer has been suspended for punching a woman during an arrest. The officer's identity has not been released.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about police conduct and accountability, prompting scrutiny of arrest procedures and use-of-force policies.

title: Car Break-ins Plague Clover Neighborhood for Second Time
summary: Thieves targeted a Clover neighborhood for the second time, breaking into multiple vehicles. At least one gun was stolen during the spree.
charlotte_impact: Highlights ongoing concerns about property crime and the potential for stolen firearms to contribute to further criminal activity.

title: Salisbury Teacher Arrested on Multiple Sex Offense Charges
summary: David Steelman, 51, a Salisbury teacher, turned himself in on multiple sex offense charges involving a former student dating back to 2012.
charlotte_impact: Addresses serious allegations of sexual misconduct by an educator, raising concerns about student safety and institutional oversight.

title: Charlotte Douglas Airport Receives $46.9M for Expansion
summary: The FAA awarded Charlotte Douglas Airport $46.9M to expand its apron. The grant is part of a larger FAA investment in airport infrastructure nationwide.
charlotte_impact: Supports infrastructure development and modernization at a major transportation hub, potentially improving efficiency and capacity.

title: Man Dies Months After Hit-and-Run in North Charlotte
summary: Frank Leon Dent died 10 months after a hit-and-run on West Sugar Creek Road. Police are seeking information on the unknown driver.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the long-term consequences of hit-and-run incidents and the ongoing efforts to bring perpetrators to justice.

title: Suspect Arrested in Hit-and-Run of 8-Year-Old in Charlotte
summary: Shaiquailalia Di Ndia Lashi Harris was charged with felony hit-and-run after an 8-year-old was struck by a vehicle near Quail Hollow Middle School on May 9.
charlotte_impact: Addresses a serious traffic incident involving a child and the swift action taken by law enforcement to apprehend the suspect.

title: Charlotte Transit System Reports Significant Drop in Crime
summary: The Charlotte transit system reports a 69% drop in crime on buses and light rail, following the implementation of security initiatives over the past year.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates the effectiveness of security measures in reducing crime on public transportation and improving passenger safety.

title: Liquor Purchases Fund Community Projects in Mecklenburg County
summary: An audit reveals that Mecklenburg County liquor purchases fund community projects, with increased funding for law enforcement and alcohol education.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the indirect benefits of alcohol sales revenue for community services and public safety initiatives.
